name: finance_stock_thesis
description: TSLA investor goal with 1 recent finding already reported
userGoal: I hold a large TSLA position. Alert me when news challenges my bull thesis — delivery misses, competitive threats from BYD/Rivian, regulatory risk, or insider selling.

recentFindings.title: Tesla Q1 2026 delivery numbers beat estimates

criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
Every query has 15 words or fewer
At least one query targets one of the stated angles (regulation, competition from BYD/Rivian, or insider selling)
No query duplicates the Q1 deliveries story already in recentFindings
At least one query includes a time marker (year, month, 'latest', or similar)

name: academic_research_with_sources
description: Research goal with 2 preferred academic sources specified
userGoal: Track new systematic reviews and meta-analyses on the effects of intermittent fasting on metabolic health.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
At least one query uses 'site:pubmed.gov' or 'site:nature.com'
At least one query uses academic terms like 'systematic review' or 'meta-analysis'
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: competitor_tracking
description: Anthropic + OpenAI competitive monitoring with 1 recent OpenAI announcement
userGoal: Monitor Anthropic and OpenAI for any pricing changes, new model releases, or reliability incidents that affect our build vs buy decision.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
At least one query references Anthropic or OpenAI by name
At least one query targets pricing, a release, or an incident
No query duplicates the OpenAI o4 announcement already in recentFindings
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: news_broad_topic
userGoal: Track developments in US-China tech decoupling — chip export controls, tariffs, and company-level responses.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
No query uses an academic site filter (no site:pubmed.gov, no site:arxiv.org)
At least one query references chip exports, tariffs, or semiconductor policy
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: avoid_recent_findings
description: Fed rate goal with 3 recent findings spanning multiple angles already reported
userGoal: Track Federal Reserve interest rate decisions and their impact on tech stock valuations.

recentFindings.title: Fed holds rates steady at March meeting

criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
No query duplicates any of the three recent findings (the March Fed meeting, Powell's patience signal, or the post-Fed tech rebound)
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: minimum_one_query
description: Narrow goal with no recent findings
userGoal: Notify me if any Function Health investors publicly discuss their positions.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array containing at least 1 query
At least one query references Function Health or its investors
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: single_preferred_source
description: Research goal with one preferred academic source (arxiv)
userGoal: Track new research papers on diffusion models and their applications in video generation.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
At least one query uses 'site:arxiv.org'
At least one query is open-ended (does not use any site: filter)
At least one query references diffusion models or video generation
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: query_length_limits
userGoal: Monitor breaking news on regulatory actions against Stripe.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array
Every query has 15 words or fewer
At least one query references Stripe and a regulatory angle

name: max_three_queries
description: Overloaded user goal listing 5 sub-topics — should still collapse to 1-3 queries
userGoal: Track for me: (1) Tesla regulatory news, (2) BYD earnings, (3) Rivian production milestones, (4) broader EV industry consolidation, and (5) battery supply chain disruptions.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array containing at most 3 entries
Every query has 15 words or fewer

name: specific_company_no_news
description: Niche company goal with no recent findings
userGoal: Alert me when Mercor (the recruiting company) publicly reveals new enterprise customers or product pivots.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a 'queries' array of 1 to 3 entries
At least one query references Mercor by name
At least one query targets enterprise customers or product pivots
Every query has 15 words or fewer
